1011110110001000 0011001110000110 0 -> sum: 1111000100001110, cout: 0
1110001111000110 0100110110011100 1 -> sum: 0011000101100011, cout: 1
0101101101001011 1101100110110101 1 -> sum: 0011010100000001, cout: 1
0010110110101001 1011110111100111 1 -> sum: 1110101110010001, cout: 0
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0
1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
